sbol:Collection.dcterms:title: CIDAR MoClo Parts
sbol:Collection.dcterms:description: Collection of genetic parts from the CIDAR MoClo kit
sbol:Collection.dc:creator: Gonzalo Vidal

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: This is the backbone core for Destination Vector Ampicillin (DVA) plasmids. Based on the pSB1A2 plasmid and contains an ampicillin resistance gene and a high copy number origin of replication.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E0040m_GFP
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Fluorescent protein. Green. Modified from Bba_E0040 to fix illegal site.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C0062_LuxR
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Controller protein, luxR repressor/activator (in concert with HSL, represses pLuxR(pR) R0063. Also up-regulates pLuxR(pL) R0062)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C6_HSL
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: N-[(3s)-2-Oxotetrahydrofuran-3-Yl]hexanamide is a N-acyl-amino acid.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: CRE
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: CRE recombinase (recombines DNA at loxP sites)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E1010m_RFP
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Fluorescent protein. Red. Modified from Bba_E1010 to fix illegal sites.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C0012m_LacI
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Controller protein, lacI repressor (in concert with CAP, represses pLacI, R0010). Modified to fix illegal site.
Ampicillin resistance gene from the pSB1A2 plasmid.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: B0033
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - Weiss RBS, low strength. Modified from Bba_B0033 to adjust spacing in MC system.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: cre
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - cre recombinase (recombines DNA at loxP sites)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23106
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - medium strength

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: IPTG
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Isopropyl beta-D-thiogalactopyranoside is an S-glycosyl compound consisting of beta-D-1-thiogalactose having an isopropyl group attached to the anomeric sulfur.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: BCD12
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - BiCistronic Design, medium strength (RBS part type, actually contains a small transcriptional unit and second RBS)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C0080_AraC
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Controller protein, araC repressor/activator (activates pBAD, I13453)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E0030_yfp
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Fluorescent protein. Yellow.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C0062_luxR
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Controller protein, luxR repressor/activator (in concert with HSL, represses pLuxR(pR) R0063. Also up-regulates pLuxR(pL) R0062)
Kanamycin resistance gene from the pSB1K3 plasmid.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23103
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - low strength

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23102
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - high strength

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: R0010_pLacI
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Controllable promoter - pLacI - lacI regulated (repressed by LacI+CAP. LacI, C0012, inhibited by IPTG)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E0040m_gfp
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Fluorescent protein. Green. Modified from Bba_E0040 to fix illegal site.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: B0015
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Double terminator (B0010:B0012)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23116
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - low strength

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: aTc
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Anhydrotetracycline is a tertiary alpha-hydroxy ketone and a member of tetracyclines. It is a tautomer of an anhydrotetracycline zwitterion.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23100
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - high strength

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: eBFP2
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Fluorescent protein. Blue. Derived from Addgene#14891.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E0030_YFP
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Fluorescent protein. Yellow.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: R0063_pLuxR-pR
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Controllable promoter - pLuxR(pR) - luxR regulated (right promoter, weak constitutive down regulated by LuxR, C0062 in combination with homoserine lactone (HSL))

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: ebfp2
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Fluorescent protein. Blue. Derived from Addgene#14891.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C0040_TetR
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Controller protein, tetR repressor (represses pTet, C0040. can be inhibited by tetracyclin or aTc)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Fusion_Site_E
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo standard fusion site E
This is the backbone core for Destination Vector Kanamycin (DVK) plasmids. Based on the pSB1K3 plasmid and contains kanamycin gene and a high copy number origin of replication.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Fusion_Site_F
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo standard fusion site F

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Fusion_Site_D
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo standard fusion site D

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Fusion_Site_G
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo standard fusion site G

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: E1010m_rfp
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Fluorescent protein. Red. Modified from Bba_E1010 to fix illegal sites.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Fusion_Site_A
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo standard fusion site A

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: LacZ_cassette
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo IPTG inducible LacZ alpha subunit

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Fusion_Site_B
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo standard fusion site B

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Fusion_Site_C
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo standard fusion site C

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C0080_araC
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Controller protein, araC repressor/activator (activates pBAD, I13453)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: LacZ_cassette2
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: Dropout with BbsI recognition sites

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C0040_tetR
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Controller protein, tetR repressor (represses pTet, C0040. can be inhibited by tetracyclin or aTc)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: BCD8
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - BiCistronic Design, low strength (RBS part type, actually contains a small transcriptional unit and second RBS)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Fusion_Site_H
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo standard fusion site H

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: C0012m_laclI
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: CDS - Controller protein, lacI repressor (in concert with CAP, represses pLacI, R0010). Modified to fix illegal site.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: Arabinose
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: L-arabinopyranose is the six-membered ring form of L-arabinose. It has a role as an Escherichia coli metabolite and a mouse metabolite.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: J23107
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Constitutive promoter - Anderson series - medium strength

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: BCD2
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - BiCistronic Design, high strength (RBS part type, actually contains a small transcriptional unit and second RBS)

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: B0032
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - Weiss RBS, medium strength. Modified from Bba_B0032 to adjust spacing in MC system.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: B0034
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: RBS - Weiss RBS, high strength. Modified from Bba_B0034 to adjust spacing in MC system.

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: R0040_pTet
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Controllable promoter - pTet - tetR regulated (strong constitutive promoter repressed by tetR, C0040, which can itself be inhibited by tetracycline or aTc)
Origin of replication from the pSB1A2/pSB1K3 plasmid. pSB1A2 is a high copy number plasmid. The replication origin is a pUC19-derived pMB1 (copy number of 100-300 per cell

sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:title: I13453_pBAD
sbol:ComponentDefinition.dcterms:description: MoClo Basic Part: Controllable promoter - pBAD - araC regulated (pBAD promoter, inducible by expression of AraC, C0080)
